zh.Newport, Pagnell, Buckingham, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾紐波特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Plantagenet於1556年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾紐波特 帕格爾時，她的父親Sir John Plantagenet England*16歲，母親Lady Anne Plantagenet Cockerell14歲。她於1577年10月7日與William Ryder在英國巴金哈姆爾紐波特 帕格爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1643年5月14日在她的家鄉享年87歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Plantagenet于1556年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾紐波特 帕格爾时，她的父亲Sir John Plantagenet England*16岁，母亲Lady Anne Plantagenet Cockerell14岁。她于1577年10月7日与William Ryder在英国巴金哈姆爾紐波特 帕格爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1643年5月14日在她的家乡享年87岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Plantagenet was born in 1556, in Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir John Plantagenet England*, was 16 and her mother, Lady Anne Plantagenet Cockerell, was 14. She married William Ryder on 7 October 1577, in Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 14 May 1643, in her hometown, at the age of 87, and was buried in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Plantagenet est née en 1556, à Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Plantagenet England*, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Plantagenet Cockerell, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé William Ryder le 7 octobre 1577, à Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 mai 1643, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterrée à Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Plantagenet 1556 in Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Plantagenet England* 16 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne Plantagenet Cockerell 14. Sie hat am 7. Oktober 1577 in Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, England William Ryder geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Plantagenetが1556年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアニュープオルト プアグネルで生まれた時，父Sir John Plantagenet England*は16歳，母Lady Anne Plantagenet Cockerellは14歳であった。1577年10月7日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアニュープオルト プアグネルでWilliam Ryderと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1643年5月14日に故郷で87歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミルトン ケインスにて埋葬された。

ko.Barton St David, South Somerset District: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Plantagenet(이)가 1556년 영국 벅잉함실르 뉴포트 파그넬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Plantagenet England*(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Plantagenet Cockerell(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1577년 10월 7일 영국 벅잉함실르 뉴포트 파그넬에서 William Ryder(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1643년 5월 14일 그녀의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Plantagenet nasceu em 1556, em Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Plantagenet England*, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Plantagenet Cockerell, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com William Ryder em 7 de outubro de 1577, em Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de maio de 1643, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos, e foi sepultada em Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Barton St David, South Somerset District: бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Plantagenet родилась в 1556 г. в местности нюпорт пагнелл, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Plantagenet England* было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Plantagenet Cockerell, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Ryder 7 октября 1577 г. в местности нюпорт пагнелл, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 14 мая 1643 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 87 лет и была похоронена в местности милтон кинесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Plantagenet nació en 1556, en Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Plantagenet England*, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Plantagenet Cockerell, tenía 14 años. Se casó con William Ryder el 7 de octubre de 1577, en Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1643, en su pueblo, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultada en Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
